# Pacifica CLI — LLM Quick Reference

Binary: pacifica | pacifica-mcp (MCP server)
Version: 0.1.0
Platform: Solana perpetuals DEX (Pacifica DEX)
Config: ~/.pacifica/config.json | Init: pacifica init

## Symbol Format
BASE-USDC-PERP (e.g. SOL-USDC-PERP, ETH-USDC-PERP, BTC-USDC-PERP)
Side: bid=long=buy | ask=short=sell
Funding: raw decimal (0.0004 = 0.04%/8h, APR = rate×3×365)

## Commands (all support --json unless noted)

pacifica init                                      # setup wizard, run once
pacifica scan [--gainers] [--losers] [--min-volume <usd>]
pacifica trade buy <SYM> <size> [-l LEV] [-t market|limit] [-p price] [--tp] [--sl]
pacifica trade sell <SYM> <size> [-l LEV] [-t market|limit] [-p price] [--tp] [--sl]
pacifica orders
pacifica orders cancel <orderId>
pacifica orders cancel-all [symbol]
pacifica positions
pacifica positions close <symbol>
pacifica heatmap [--compact]                       # no --json
pacifica journal [--all] [--weekly] [--monthly] [--symbol] [--limit]
pacifica journal export [--format csv|json] [--out] [--from] [--to]
pacifica funding
pacifica simulate <long|short> <market> <size_usd> [--leverage] [--entry]
pacifica alerts list
pacifica alerts add --symbol <SYM> --above|--below|--funding-above|--funding-below|--volume-spike <val>
pacifica alerts remove <id>
pacifica alerts check [--all]
pacifica alerts daemon start|stop|status [--interval <s>]
pacifica smart trailing <symbol> -d <pct>
pacifica smart list [--active]
pacifica smart cancel <id>
pacifica arb scan [--min-apr <n>]
pacifica arb start [--size <usd>] [--min-apr <n>] [--max-positions <n>]
pacifica arb stop
pacifica arb status
pacifica arb list [--status active|closed|error|all]
pacifica arb close <id>
pacifica arb config [--show] [--min-apr] [--size] [--max-positions] [--exit] [--enable|--disable]
pacifica leaderboard [--limit] [--live] [--watch] [--filter rising|falling|consistent]
pacifica intelligence patterns
pacifica intelligence reputation [--limit]
pacifica intelligence run [--patterns]
pacifica intelligence me
pacifica intelligence serve [--port]
pacifica watch                                     # TUI, no --json
pacifica copy watch <address> [--multiplier] [--auto] [--interval]
pacifica copy list
pacifica agent status
pacifica agent start | stop | config | log [--today] [--action] [--symbol] [--limit]

## Key Flags
--json       machine-readable output on stdout
--testnet    override network to testnet
--leverage   1–50 (trade commands)
--validate   (not a real flag — use simulate first, then trade)

## Dangerous Commands (require care)
trade buy, trade sell, positions close,
orders cancel, orders cancel-all,
arb start, arb close, copy watch --auto

## Output: JSON arrays/objects on stdout. Errors to stderr, exit code 1.
## Safety: always simulate before trading. check agent status before autonomous sessions.
## Rep scores: 0–100. >= 70 = high quality trader.
## Patterns: verified=true, win_rate >= 0.60, sample_size >= 10 = reliable signal.
